careers.name: Software Engineer
careers.one_liner: Designs, builds, and maintains software systems — from apps you use daily to the infrastructure that powers them.
careers.description: Writes code, reviews PRs, debugs production issues, designs APIs and databases. Works in product companies (Google, Microsoft, Razorpay) or services (TCS, Infosys, Accenture). India's most-hired role.
careers.typical_day: Stand-up at 10 AM, code 2–3 features, code reviews, deploy, on-call rotations, learning new frameworks.

pathway.class_10: Pick MPC. Start light Python via Khan Academy or NPTEL. Learn typing.
pathway.class_11_12: Crack JEE Main / EAPCET / BITSAT. Side-projects on GitHub.
pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech in CSE (4 yrs) — IIT/NIT/IIIT/BITS or AP-state college.
pathway.entry_role: Software Development Engineer-1 / Junior Developer (₹4–25 LPA depending on college tier)
pathway.growth_path: SDE-2 → Senior SDE → Tech Lead / EM (₹40–100+ LPA at FAANG India)

ai_impact.reasoning: Boilerplate code is being automated by Copilot/Cursor. System design, debugging novel issues, customer-facing engineering remain human-led. Expect 'AI-augmented engineer' as the new normal — fewer junior roles per project, more senior+AI productivity.

myths: You need IIT to get a high-paying SDE job — false; product-company hiring is increasingly skill-based
You stop coding after 5 years — false; many senior engineers code daily
Indian engineers only do 'service' work — false; global product companies have massive India offices
careers.source: India Skills Report 2026, Levels.fyi, Naukri JobSpeak

careers.name: Data Scientist
careers.one_liner: Turns raw data into business decisions using statistics, machine learning, and storytelling.
careers.description: Builds predictive models, runs experiments, communicates insights. Works with product, marketing, finance teams. Data scientists at Indian fintech / e-comm earn 25–40% premium for AI specialisation.
careers.typical_day: SQL queries, model training in Jupyter, A/B test analysis, stakeholder presentations, MLOps.

pathway.class_10: Strong maths + curiosity. Try Khan Academy stats.
pathway.class_11_12: Maths + Physics + (CS elective if available). JEE / EAPCET / BITSAT.
pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech CSE / Data Science / Stats (IIT, IIIT-H, IIT Madras BSc Data Science online + on-campus, ISI)
pathway.entry_role: Data Analyst (₹6–10 LPA) → Data Scientist after 1–2 years
pathway.growth_path: Senior DS → Lead DS / ML Engineer → Head of Data (₹50–80 LPA at top firms)

salary_inr.fresher: ₹6–9 LPA (₹12–20 LPA at IIT/NIT product cos)

ai_impact.reasoning: Routine SQL and dashboarding are being absorbed by AI tools. Causal inference, experimental design, business judgment, storytelling remain human. Generalists hurt; specialists thrive.

myths: You need a PhD — false; ~80% of working DSes have only Bachelor's/Master's
It's all coding — actually 40% communication, 30% analysis, 30% coding

careers.name: AI / ML Engineer
careers.one_liner: Builds and ships machine learning systems — from recommendation engines to LLM-powered products.
careers.description: Trains, fine-tunes, evaluates, and deploys ML models. India holds 16% of global AI talent and is projected to reach 1.25 million AI professionals by 2027. GenAI commands the highest premium of any 2026 role.
careers.typical_day: Data prep, model training/eval, deploying APIs, monitoring drift, on-call for inference latency, prompt engineering.

pathway.class_10: Maths foundation. Try free ML courses (Andrew Ng on Coursera audit).
pathway.class_11_12: JEE / EAPCET / BITSAT. Build a small ML project.
pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech CSE / AI / Data Science. Specialisation in junior year.
pathway.entry_role: ML Engineer / Applied Scientist (₹10–20 LPA freshers; ₹25–40 LPA at top product cos)
pathway.growth_path: Senior MLE → Staff MLE → Principal / Head of AI (₹60 LPA – 1.5 Cr)

ai_impact.reasoning: These are the people building AI — most resilient role in tech. Risk only if you stay generalist; specialise in GenAI, MLOps, or evals to compound.
at_risk_tasks: building basic classifiers from scratch (now AutoML)

myths: AI engineers only work for FAANG — false; every Indian fintech, e-comm, healthtech is hiring
You need to publish papers — false; product MLE work is mostly engineering

careers.name: Civil Engineer
careers.one_liner: Designs and builds infrastructure — buildings, bridges, metros, ports, water systems.
careers.description: Works in construction, real estate, government PWD, consulting (L&T, AECOM, Tata Projects). Stable government careers via Engineering Services Examination.

pathway.class_11_12: JEE / EAPCET. Visit construction sites if possible.
pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech Civil — IIT/NIT/JNTU/Andhra University.
pathway.entry_role: Site engineer / design engineer (₹4–8 LPA private; ₹6–7 LPA L&T)
pathway.growth_path: Project Manager → Project Director (₹25–50 LPA at L&T-tier; PSU/government track for stability)

ai_impact.reasoning: On-site engineering is fundamentally physical. AutoCAD/BIM augments rather than replaces. Risk only in pure design/drafting roles.

careers.name: Mechanical Engineer
careers.one_liner: Designs machines, vehicles, factories, and the manufacturing systems that make modern India work.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech Mechanical (4 yrs).
pathway.growth_path: Engineering Manager → Plant Manager (₹20–50 LPA)

ai_impact.reasoning: CAD and FEA are AI-augmented; production lines are being automated. Manufacturing strategy and process engineering remain human.

careers.name: Electrical Engineer
careers.one_liner: Power systems, semiconductors, EV powertrains, renewable energy — the foundation of modern India.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech EEE (4 yrs)
pathway.entry_role: Design / power engineer (₹4–10 LPA private; PSU pays well)
pathway.growth_path: Senior engineer → DGM (₹15–40 LPA in private; PSU equivalent)

ai_impact.reasoning: Semiconductor design is booming under India's chip-fab push. Power engineering is durable.

careers.name: Aerospace Engineer
careers.one_liner: Designs aircraft, satellites, drones — works at ISRO, HAL, DRDO, or global firms.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech Aerospace — IIT Bombay/Madras/Kanpur, or BS at IIST
pathway.growth_path: ISRO Scientist → Project Director (₹12–30 LPA government track)

ai_impact.reasoning: Frontier R&D is highly resilient.

careers.name: Cybersecurity Analyst
careers.one_liner: Defends systems, networks, and data from attacks. India's cybersecurity market projected to hit ₹280 bn.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech CSE / Cybersecurity, plus certifications (CompTIA Security+, CEH, OSCP)
pathway.growth_path: SOC Analyst → Pentester → CISO (₹30 LPA – 1.5 Cr at senior)

ai_impact.reasoning: AI both creates threats and defends — cyber is one of the safest growth roles. 30–35% YoY job growth.

careers.name: Robotics Engineer
careers.one_liner: Builds physical autonomous systems — warehouse robots, drones, surgical robots, self-driving.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech Mech/EEE/CSE + Robotics M.Tech.
pathway.growth_path: Robotics Engineer → Lead → Head of Robotics (₹15–60 LPA)

ai_impact.reasoning: AI's physical embodiment — fastest-growing niche in 2026.

careers.name: Semiconductor / Chip Design Engineer
careers.one_liner: Designs the chips that power phones, cars, and AI servers. India's national chip-fab push (₹76,000 cr) is creating hundreds of thousands of roles.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech ECE / EEE → M.Tech VLSI
pathway.growth_path: Design Engineer → Architect → Sr. Architect (₹25 LPA – 1.2 Cr at Qualcomm/Nvidia/AMD India)

ai_impact.reasoning: Chips are the hardware AI runs on — fundamentally durable.

careers.source: India Skills Report 2026, MeitY Semiconductor Mission

careers.name: MBBS Doctor
careers.one_liner: The default medical degree — opens specialisation in 30+ branches and 50+ year career.
careers.description: 5.5-year programme (4.5 academic + 1 internship). Then optional MD/MS specialisation (3 yr) + super-specialisation (DM/MCh, 3 yr).

pathway.class_10: BiPC. Watch your fitness — medical careers are demanding.
pathway.class_11_12: Crack NEET-UG. NCERT Biology is the bible.
pathway.undergraduate: MBBS at AIIMS / JIPMER / KMC Manipal / state medical college via NEET
pathway.postgraduate: MD/MS in your chosen specialty via NEET-PG (3 yrs)
pathway.entry_role: Junior resident (₹5–8 LPA government; ₹6–12 LPA private)
pathway.growth_path: Specialist → Super-specialist → Senior Consultant (₹25 LPA – 2 Cr+ at 15 yrs)

ai_impact.reasoning: Diagnostics (radiology, pathology) are AI-augmented but not replaced. Surgery, patient care, complex judgment remain human-led. Indian doctor shortage means demand exceeds supply for decades.

myths: MBBS = ₹50 lakh package after 5 years — false; MBBS alone = ₹6–10 LPA, super-specialisation drives the big numbers
Government medical colleges are second-class — false; AIIMS / JIPMER / Maulana Azad outrank most private

careers.name: Dentist (BDS)
careers.one_liner: Oral health specialist — clinic practice, hospital, or research.

pathway.undergraduate: BDS (5 yrs incl. internship) via NEET
pathway.growth_path: Clinic practice or MDS specialisation (₹5–25 LPA, own clinic can scale to ₹30 LPA+)

careers.name: AYUSH Doctor (BAMS / BHMS / BUMS / BSMS)
careers.one_liner: Practitioner of Ayurveda, Homeopathy, Unani, or Siddha — strong govt push under Ministry of AYUSH.

pathway.undergraduate: BAMS / BHMS / BUMS / BSMS via NEET (5.5 yrs)
pathway.growth_path: Practice / MD AYUSH / govt Ayush Mission

careers.name: Nurse (B.Sc Nursing)
careers.one_liner: Direct patient care — India faces a 2-million nurse shortage; demand is exploding domestically and abroad.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Sc Nursing (4 yrs) via AIIMS BSc Nursing exam or state CET
pathway.growth_path: Staff Nurse → Nursing Officer → Matron / Director of Nursing (₹4–15 LPA in India; ₹50 LPA+ in Gulf/UK/US)

ai_impact.reasoning: Bedside care is one of the safest healthcare roles.

careers.name: Pharmacist (B.Pharm)
careers.one_liner: Drug discovery, dispensing, regulatory affairs, pharmaceutical manufacturing — India is the pharmacy of the world.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Pharm (4 yrs)
pathway.growth_path: QA → R&D → regulatory affairs (₹4–18 LPA Indian Pharma; higher at MNCs)

careers.name: Physiotherapist (BPT)
careers.one_liner: Rehabilitation specialist — sports, neurology, ortho, paediatric. Massive global demand.

pathway.undergraduate: BPT (4.5 yrs incl. internship)
pathway.growth_path: Clinic / sports team / MPT (₹3–15 LPA India; ₹40 LPA+ abroad)

careers.name: Biotechnologist
careers.one_liner: Biopharma, vaccines, gene therapy, agritech. India's biotech industry crossed $150 bn in 2025.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Tech Biotech / B.Sc Biotech / IISER BS-MS
pathway.growth_path: Research scientist → R&D Lead at Biocon / Bharat Biotech / Serum Institute (₹6–40 LPA)

ai_impact.reasoning: AI accelerates drug discovery — biotech is one of the most AI-augmented growth fields.

careers.name: Veterinarian
careers.one_liner: Animal doctor — clinical practice, livestock, wildlife, food safety.

pathway.undergraduate: B.V.Sc & A.H. (5.5 yrs) via ICAR AIEEA or state quota
pathway.growth_path: Govt vet → Director of Veterinary Services (₹5–18 LPA)

careers.name: Clinical Psychologist
careers.one_liner: Mental health professional — diagnosis and therapy. India's mental health workforce gap is 80%.

pathway.undergraduate: BA/BSc Psychology + MA/MSc Clinical Psychology + M.Phil Clinical Psychology (RCI-licensed)
pathway.growth_path: Hospital / private practice (₹5–25 LPA)

ai_impact.reasoning: Therapeutic relationship is fundamentally human; demand outstrips supply 10:1.

careers.name: Lawyer (Litigator / Corporate)
careers.one_liner: From courtroom litigator to corporate M&A advisor — most under-rated career in tier-3 India.

pathway.class_11_12: Any stream. Read the newspaper daily. Start CLAT prep in Class 11.
pathway.undergraduate: BA LLB (5 yrs) at NLU via CLAT or AILET
pathway.entry_role: Junior associate at Tier-1 firm (₹15–25 LPA NLU grad) or chamber under senior advocate (₹2–6 LPA litigation)
pathway.growth_path: Senior associate → Partner (₹50 LPA – 5 Cr+); Litigation: Senior counsel (₹20 LPA – many crores)

ai_impact.reasoning: Doc review and basic research are AI-automated. Negotiation, courtroom advocacy, complex judgment, client relationships are deeply human.

myths: Lawyers earn nothing for first 5 years — false at NLUs (₹15-25 LPA day 1); true in pure litigation
You need to be in Commerce/Arts — false; engineering+law (IP litigation) is lucrative
careers.source: Law Drishti, NIRF 2025, Quora industry data

careers.name: Civil Services Officer (IAS / IPS / IFS)
careers.one_liner: Top administrative tier of India — district magistrate at 27, Cabinet Secretary at 60.

pathway.undergraduate: Bachelor's in any subject (engineering students also crack it)
pathway.exam: UPSC Civil Services Examination — Prelims, Mains, Interview (12–18 months serious prep)
pathway.entry_role: Sub-Collector / ASP / Asst. Secretary (₹56,100/month + allowances + housing)
pathway.growth_path: Collector → Secretary → Chief Secretary / Cabinet Secretary

ai_impact.reasoning: Public administration, policy judgment, electoral accountability are durable. AI augments routine paperwork.

myths: You need history/political-science — false; engineers and doctors crack it regularly

careers.name: Judicial Service Officer (Judge)
careers.one_liner: Sub-Judge → District Judge → High Court → Supreme Court. State Judicial Service Examinations after LLB.

pathway.undergraduate: LLB (3 yr) or BA LLB (5 yr)
pathway.exam: State Public Service Commission Civil Judge exam

careers.name: Public Policy Analyst
careers.one_liner: Researches and shapes policy at think tanks, government, multilaterals (UN, World Bank).

pathway.undergraduate: Economics / Political Science / Public Policy (Ashoka, NLS, JGU)
pathway.postgraduate: MPP at IIM-B / Harvard Kennedy / Sciences Po

careers.name: Defence Officer (Army / Navy / Air Force)
careers.one_liner: Commission via NDA after Class 12 — 3 yrs at NDA Pune + 1 yr service academy. Commissioned as Lieutenant.

pathway.exam: NDA & NA via UPSC + SSB Interview

careers.name: Chartered Accountant (CA)
careers.one_liner: Audit, tax, financial advisory — the most-cited 'safe' commerce career, with strong upside via Big 4 + industry CFO track.

pathway.class_11_12: Commerce stream easiest; MPC also fine. Accountancy + Economics + Business Studies.
pathway.exam_track: CA Foundation (after XII) → Intermediate (8 mo) → 3 yr Articleship + Final
pathway.growth_path: Senior Manager (₹20–35 LPA) → Partner (₹50 LPA – 1 Cr+) or industry CFO (₹50 LPA – 2 Cr+)

salary_inr.fresher: ₹6–13 LPA (₹8.5–12 LPA at Big 4; rank holders ₹13–18 LPA)

ai_impact.reasoning: Routine bookkeeping and tax filing are being automated. Strategic advisory, complex tax planning, forensic accounting, audit judgment, CFO roles remain strongly human. CA + data analytics + Indian regtech (GST/TDS/Tally automation) = future leader.

myths: Must be in Commerce stream — false; MPC + CA is fine
5% pass rate makes it impossible — misleading; ~10–15% per attempt, ~40% cumulative for serious aspirants
CAs only do audit — false; ~40% in industry, banking, consulting, fintech, govt, own practice
careers.source: ICAI, Business Standard, Big 4 careers pages

careers.name: Company Secretary (CS)
careers.one_liner: Corporate governance, compliance, board secretariat — the 'lawyer-accountant' inside companies.

careers.name: Cost & Management Accountant (CMA)
careers.one_liner: Costing, internal audit, management accounting — heavy demand in manufacturing and operations.

careers.name: Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA)
careers.one_liner: Global gold standard for investment management, equity research, portfolio management.

pathway.exam: 3 levels (Level 1 in college; charter after relevant work experience)

careers.name: Investment Banker
careers.one_liner: Advises on M&A, IPOs, capital raises. The highest-paying entry-level finance role in India.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Com / BBA / Eco Hons / B.Tech (any) → IIM 5-yr IPM or 2-yr MBA → IB analyst at Goldman/Morgan Stanley
pathway.growth_path: Associate → VP → MD (₹2–10 Cr at MD)

ai_impact.reasoning: Pitch-deck production and modelling are AI-augmented. Client relationships, deal judgment, sourcing remain human.

careers.name: Actuary
careers.one_liner: Risk and probability expert — insurance, pensions, climate risk. India has fewer than 600 fellow actuaries.

pathway.exam: ACET (Actuarial Common Entrance Test) → 13 papers across CT, CA, ST, SA

careers.name: Economist
careers.one_liner: Researches markets, policy, behaviour. Roles in govt (RBI, NITI Aayog), academia, consulting, multilaterals.

pathway.undergraduate: BA Economics (Hons) at DU / Ashoka / JNU / Madras School of Economics

careers.name: IIM IPM Manager
careers.one_liner: 5-yr integrated BBA + MBA at IIM Indore / Rohtak / Jammu / Bodhgaya. The fastest route to an IIM MBA.

careers.name: UX / Product Designer
careers.one_liner: Designs how apps and websites feel and work. India's fastest-growing design career.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Des at NID / IDC IIT-B / Srishti / MIT-ID via NID DAT or UCEED
pathway.growth_path: Junior → Senior → Lead UX (₹8–60 LPA)

ai_impact.reasoning: AI handles asset generation; design judgment, research, accessibility, motion remain human.

careers.name: Architect
careers.one_liner: Designs buildings, masterplans, interiors. 5-yr B.Arch via NATA.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Arch (5 yrs)

careers.name: Fashion / Textile Designer
careers.one_liner: Designs apparel, textiles, accessories. NIFT is the gateway.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Des Fashion / Textile via NIFT entrance

careers.name: Journalist / Media Professional
careers.one_liner: Reports, anchors, writes. Print, TV, digital, podcasts — strongest growth in regional language video.

pathway.undergraduate: BA Journalism / Mass Comm at IIMC / ACJ Chennai / Symbiosis / Jamia

careers.name: Animator / VFX Artist
careers.one_liner: From RRR to Spider-Verse to Indian streaming originals — India is a global VFX hub.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Des Animation / Diploma at MAAC / Arena / Whistling Woods

careers.name: Psychologist (Counselling / Educational / Organisational)
careers.one_liner: Counselling, organisational psych, educational psych — India's mental health awareness is exploding.

pathway.undergraduate: BA/BSc Psychology + MA + (RCI license for clinical)

careers.name: Research Scientist (BS-MS / PhD)
careers.one_liner: Frontier research in physics, chemistry, biology, math. IISER, IISc, TIFR, NIPER, ISRO, DRDO.

pathway.undergraduate: BS-MS at IISER / BSc at IISc / B.Tech + MS+PhD

ai_impact.reasoning: Frontier research is AI-augmented; original discovery is human-led.

careers.name: Mathematician / Statistician
careers.one_liner: Pure math, applied math, statistics. ISI, CMI, IISc, TIFR.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Stat / B.Math at ISI / CMI

careers.name: Hotel Manager / Hospitality
careers.one_liner: Operations, F&B, front office, events. India's tourism is forecast to add 50 million jobs by 2030.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Sc HHA via NCHM JEE at IHM Pusa / Mumbai / Bangalore

careers.name: Commercial Pilot
careers.one_liner: Captain of a commercial airliner. Indian aviation needs 22,400+ pilots by FY 2030.

pathway.training: DGCA Class 2 → Class 1 → 200 flying hours → CPL → Type Rating

ai_impact.reasoning: Cockpit automation deepens but pilot role persists; DGCA mandates 2 pilots per commercial flight.

careers.name: Electrician (ITI / Apprenticeship)
careers.one_liner: Skill-rich, fast to earn, low education cost — and globally in demand. ITI Electrician is one of the most-employable trades in India.

pathway.growth_path: Self-employment, Railways, BHEL, ONGC, overseas (₹50K–1.5L/month)

ai_impact.reasoning: Physical work that cannot be replaced by software.

careers.source: DGT 2026, India Skills Report 2026 ITI 45.95% employability

careers.name: Agripreneur / Agri-Tech Founder
careers.one_liner: Modern farming, agri-supply chain, FPOs, agri-fintech. India's agri-tech sector raised $2 bn in 2025.

pathway.undergraduate: B.Sc Agriculture / B.Tech Agri-Engineering via ICAR AIEEA, optional MBA Agri
